source_feedback: Engineer feedback captured after reviewing the live report against the current parallel-code tree and architecture docs.

verdicts.engineer_note: The file is already the canonical task presentation model with direct tests. An explicit total mapping could still help, but it is not a top architecture issue.
verdicts.expected_v2_behavior: Keep as an objective hardening signal and avoid ranking it as repo-roadmap-critical.

verdicts.engineer_note: Runtime handling is already exhaustive. The remaining gap is presentation grouping in App.tsx rather than a high-severity lifecycle bug.
verdicts.expected_v2_behavior: Keep as presentation hardening evidence instead of a high-severity architecture signal.

verdicts.engineer_note: The pair is no longer symmetric enough to recommend helper extraction by default. Shared contract tests are a better first response.
verdicts.expected_v2_behavior: Surface as clone drift evidence with a watchpoint classification, not as a top dedupe target.

verdicts.engineer_note: This is real duplication and a strong maintainability cleanup candidate.
verdicts.expected_v2_behavior: Keep as a high-confidence duplication debt signal.

verdicts.engineer_note: This seam already has architecture tests and is worth watching closely as behavior grows.
verdicts.expected_v2_behavior: Keep as an evidence-backed coordination watchpoint.

verdicts.engineer_note: Less compelling than browser-control-plane as a top hotspot target in the current architecture state.
verdicts.expected_v2_behavior: Downrank relative to stronger hotspot evidence without suppressing the factual hotspot metrics.
